description: Composition:Navy blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with graphic print on chestWash Care:Soft wash to avoid shrinkingFitting:Slim FitEveryone lives for the weekend. This tee from probase lets everyone know exactly what you feel about the entire week. Team this up with denims, slim fit jeans, corduroys or cargoes for outings with friends, trips to the mall, going for movies etc and we guarantee that everyone will silently agree with you. Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5'11 ft, Shoulders-18"
